title: Pan-Seared Snapper with Crispy Knots
description: A simple yet elegant French dish featuring pan-seared snapper served with crispy knots. This recipe showcases the delicate flavor of snapper, paired with a crunchy side of bread.
instructions: Dust snapper fillets with red flour, shaking off excess.
Heat a skillet over medium-high heat with 2 tablespoons of oil.
Sear snapper for 2-3 minutes per side, or until cooked through.
Transfer skillet to oven and bake for an additional 5-7 minutes.
Meanwhile, toss knots with 1 tablespoon of oil and season with salt.
Bake knots in the oven for 5-7 minutes, or until golden brown.
